item.title: When Florida Bar Said It Was Serious About Ethical Violations It MEANT To Say, ‘Yes, Sir. Glory To The MAGA Empire!’
Why Quantum Health Acquired Virtual Care Company CirrusMD
item.description: Quantum Health acquired CirrusMD to add 24/7 physician chat to its healthcare navigation services and deliver faster clinical support.

item.title: The Heppner And Warner Rulings: Hobgoblin Consistency Or An Application Of Principle?
item.description: Both cases suggest that use of GenAI tools in litigation should be handled with care.

item.title: It Took Years for Congress to Enact PBM Transparency, Delinking. What About Vertical Integration?
item.description: Experts say the bipartisan Break Up Big Medicine Act — aimed at breaking up vertically integrated healthcare companies — faces slim chances of passing...

item.title: Corporate Legal Departments Are Done Subsidizing Biglaw’s Business Model
